nodes.name: Thyolo alethe
nodes.summary: Thyolo alethe（Thyolo alethe，学名 Chamaetylas choloensis），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: On Mount Namuli, the species was formerly common in mid-altitude forest at elevations of 1,200–1,400 m, but this habitat has now been almost entirely destroyed. The species primarily inhabits the ground layer of submontane and montane forests, especially moist submontane forests at elevations of 1,000–1,700 meters

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It was previously more widespread in both countries, but has had its range reduced due to the deforestation of many of the submontane forests it inhabits
